versions.version_description: This version of One Direction's Drag Me Down is the one used by One Direction's bassist.

tuning: E A D G B E
content:
CAPO ON 3RD 


[Harry]

[tab][ch]Am[/ch]                    [ch]F[/ch]
  I've got fire for a heart[/tab]
[tab]                      [ch]G[/ch]
I'm not scared of the dark[/tab]
[tab]                     [ch]Dm[/ch]
You've never seen it look so easy[/tab]
[tab][ch]Am[/ch]                    [ch]F[/ch]
  I got a river for a soul[/tab]
[tab]                  [ch]G[/ch]
And baby you're a boat[/tab]
[tab]               [ch]Dm[/ch]
Baby you're my only reason[/tab]


[Louis]

[tab]   [ch]Am[/ch]                               [ch]F[/ch]
If I didn't have you there would be nothing left[/tab]
[tab]    [ch]G[/ch]                              [ch]Dm[/ch]
The shell of a man who could never be his best[/tab]
[tab]   [ch]Am[/ch]                           [ch]F[/ch]
If I didn't have you, I'd never see the sun[/tab]
[tab]    [ch]G[/ch]                [ch]Dm[/ch]
You taught me how to be someone, yeah[/tab]


[Liam]

[tab][ch]Am[/ch]          [ch]F[/ch]
All my life[/tab]
[tab]                [ch]G[/ch]
You stood by me[/tab]
[tab]                          [ch]Dm[/ch]
When no one else was ever behind me[/tab]
[tab][ch]Am[/ch]                [ch]F[/ch]
All these lights[/tab]
[tab]                     [ch]G[/ch]
They can't blind me[/tab]
[tab]                  [ch]Dm[/ch]                [ch]Am[/ch]
With your love, nobody can drag me down[/tab]


[Niall]

[tab]            [ch]F[/ch]
All my life[/tab]
[tab]                [ch]G[/ch]

[tab]                     [ch]G[/ch]
They can't blind me[/tab]
[tab]                  [ch]Dm[/ch]                [ch]Am[/ch]
With your love, nobody can drag me down[/tab]

[tab]([ch]Am[/ch])     [ch]F[/ch]                   [ch]G[/ch]
             Nobody, nobody[/tab]
